exemplar.title:
What role do Aristotle's modes of persuasion play in Kamala 
Harris's presidential campaign speeches?

detailedExemplarData.title:
What role do Aristotle's modes of persuasion play in Kamala 
Harris's presidential campaign speeches?

subject.title: English B
subject.description:
**IB English B** is a **Group 2** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **language acquisition through five prescribed themes: identities, experiences, human ingenuity, social organization, and sharing the planet**, with a strong focus on **developing receptive, productive, and interactive communication skills in English as a second language**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2025**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| **Assessment** | **Format** | **SL** | **HL** | **Weighting** |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Paper 1** | Productive skills - writing | 1 hour | 1 hour 15 minutes | 25% |
| **Paper 2** | Receptive skills - listening and reading comprehension | 1 hour 45 minutes | 2 hours | 50% |
| **Individual Oral** | Internal assessment - oral communication | 15 min prep + 10 min exam | 15 min prep + 10 min exam | 25% |

strengths: Research question is precisely stated, sharply focused and consistently integrated into each analytical chapter.
The topic is communicated accurately and effectively, with clear and appropriate purpose and focus throughout.
Methodological choices (rhetorical analysis of speeches, polling data, secondary scholarship) are generally appropriate and evident in the body of the work.
weaknesses: Methodological details are dispersed rather than consolidated under a dedicated section, hindering transparency.
Sampling logic for audience-reaction evidence is only briefly sketched and requires clearer justification.
Preliminary descriptions (e.g., concession speech summary) are more descriptive than analytical and could better preview the argument.
Occasional repetition and superfluous contextual sentences dilute methodological clarity.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The investigation maintains a clear and purposeful focus, with a precisely formulated research question and tightly anchored chapters. However, the methodological rationale is only partially developed and would benefit from a more systematic presentation and fuller justification of source selection. This places the work in the upper middle of the 6-point band.

strengths: Source material (primary speeches, classical texts, peer-reviewed scholarship) is consistently integrated and clearly relevant to the analysis.
Subject knowledge of Aristotelian rhetoric and contemporary political context is coherent and generally comprehensive.
Technical terminology is accurately defined on first use and applied consistently throughout the essay.
weaknesses: Foundational definitions rely on popular websites rather than primary classical or peer-reviewed sources, limiting academic rigor.
Several rhetorical devices are discussed together without distinguishing their distinct effects, reducing conceptual precision.
Some arguments (e.g., gender bias in statistical appeals) lack empirical support to substantiate claims.
Occasional over-generalizations (e.g., attributing all logical fallacies to a single poll) suggest minor gaps in source application.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The essay demonstrates clear and coherent subject knowledge, effective use of terminology and appropriate application of sources. Minor reliance on non-academic websites and occasional conceptual imprecision prevent full attainment of the highest band, justifying a robust but not maximum score.

strengths: A good range of relevant sources is employed, with primary evidence from speeches and credible secondary literature connected to the research question.
Analysis is logically structured, linking textual evidence to Aristotelian theory and political context in a generally sustained manner.
The conclusion acknowledges limitations and suggests areas for future research, demonstrating reasoned evaluation.
weaknesses: Some reasoning gaps persist, such as equating single poll shifts directly with rhetorical effectiveness.
Critical discussions (e.g., ad hominem attacks by opponents, audience-segment responses) are left incomplete or unaddressed.
Redundancies in contextual sections and lack of critique on data reliability undermine analytical depth.
Chapters occasionally end with summary rather than evaluative synthesis, weakening overall argumentative coherence.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The argument is focused, coherent and underpinned by relevant research, placing it solidly in the lower half of the 7â9 band. However, incomplete analyses, unaddressed counterarguments and limited methodological critique prevent elevation to the highest levels of critical thinking.

strengths: All required structural components (title page, contents, introduction, chapters, conclusion, bibliography, appendices) are present and logically ordered.
Layout conventions (page numbering, double spacing, consistent font, word count) are correctly applied.
Headings and subheadings effectively guide the reader through the argument.
weaknesses: An abstract is missing, reducing navigational clarity.
Several sections end abruptly (incomplete paragraphs and conclusions), undermining coherence.
Bibliography entries are not consistently alphabetized and long URLs disrupt line breaks.
HTML artefacts in footnotes and abrupt transitions detract from overall polish.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Despite a number of presentation lapsesâmissing abstract, incomplete sentences, minor formatting artefactsâthe work meets all core IB layout requirements and exhibits a clearly appropriate and complete structure, meriting the top band score.

strandSelections.reasoning: The research question ("What role do Aristotleâs modes of persuasion play in Kamala Harrisâs presidential campaign speeches?") is **precisely worded, sharply focused and foregrounded** on the title page and in the introduction. Each analytical chapter (Ethos, Pathos, Logos) is structured to answer this question directly, and the conclusion explicitly returns to it. The linkage between the RQ and the essayâs argumentation is therefore clear and sustained, meeting the highest descriptor for clarity, focus and integration.

The student offers **sustained, logically structured analysis** of Harrisâs rhetorical moves, frequently linking linguistic evidence to Aristotelian theory and broader political context. Insights into antithesis, metaphor and identity politics show thoughtful engagement. Nonetheless, some reasoning gapsâsuch as assuming single poll shifts equate to persuasive successâprevent the analysis from reaching the highest excellence, positioning it solidly but not at the top of the 7â9 band.

Primary (two full speeches) and secondary sourcesâincluding classical texts, peer-reviewed scholarship, and reputable journalismâare **consistently integrated into the analysis**. Quotations are purposefully selected to illustrate Aristotelian concepts, and the student comments insightfully on their significance. Popular media sources are sometimes relied upon for political context, but they remain relevant and are used judiciously. Overall, application of source material is clearly appropriate and supports the argument, meriting the 5â6 band, though a slightly heavier weighting of academic studies would have strengthened it further.

The essay adheres to IB layout conventions: consistent page numbering, double spacing, standard font, and inclusion of word count and title. Minor issuesâsuch as long URLs disrupting line breaks and a few HTML artefacts in footnotesâare present but do not impede readability. Overall, the **required presentation elements are met and correctly applied**, aligning with the highest band for layout.

The essay demonstrates **clear, coherent and generally comprehensive understanding** of Aristotelian rhetoric and contemporary political discourse. Concepts such as aretÄ, eunoia, kairos and topoi are defined accurately and applied meaningfully to Harrisâs speeches. Occasional over-generalisation (e.g., attributing all logical fallacies to a single poll) shows minor gaps, but the overall command of subject matter and supporting scholarship reflects effective use of sources, situating the work firmly in the 5â6 band.

All required structural componentsâtitle page, abstract substitute, contents, introduction, body chapters, conclusion, bibliography and appendicesâare present and logically ordered. Headings and sub-headings aid navigation, and the argument flows clearly despite minor sentence fragments and abrupt transitions. These small lapses aside, the overall framework is **clearly appropriate and complete**, warranting the top band for structure.

The investigation draws on a **good range of relevant sources**âclassical texts, scholarly works on rhetoric, and contemporary news coverageâto address the research question. Evidence from the primary speeches is plentiful and well-chosen. While reliance on journalistic pieces slightly limits scholarly depth, the materials are nonetheless credible and effectively connected to the argument, fulfilling the descriptors for the 7â9 band at its lower end.

The student states the topic explicitly in the title and reiterates it in the opening lines, making it immediately clear that the essay investigates Kamala Harrisâs campaign rhetoric through Aristotleâs modes of persuasion. Throughout the paper the discussion remains tightly anchored to this focus, with every main section (Ethos, Pathos, Logos) and the conclusion circling back to the central idea of rhetorical function. There are no major digressions, and contextual information in the âPolitical Informationâ section is consistently tied back to the research focus. 

Minor weaknessesâsuch as occasional repetition and a few superfluous contextual sentencesâdo not undermine the overall clarity of purpose. On balance, the topic is communicated **accurately, consistently and purposefully**, fully satisfying the descriptors for the top band.

The discussion synthesizes ethos, pathos and logos effectively, culminating in a conclusion that acknowledges limitations and proposes future research. Arguments are generally coherent and well supported, demonstrating **focused, reasoned evaluation**. Occasional redundancy and lingering assumptions (e.g., limited exploration of methodological constraints) produce minor unevenness, but overall the essay maintains a persuasive through-line characteristic of the 7â9 bandâs lower range.

The student explains the methodological approachâclose rhetorical analysis of two speeches, supported by secondary scholarship, polling data and media commentaryâoffering some justification for text selection and evaluation criteria. However, details are dispersed within the introduction rather than consolidated under a dedicated methodology section, and the sampling logic for audienceâreaction evidence remains only briefly sketched. While the chosen methods are generally appropriate and evident in the body chapters, the explanation is **partially developed** rather than fully systematic, aligning with the 3â4 band.

Technical vocabularyâethos, pathos, logos, kairos, topoi, ad hominem, antithesis, personificationâis **accurately defined on first use and applied consistently** throughout the analysis. The student demonstrates assured control of rhetorical terminology, using it precisely to dissect speech excerpts and explain persuasive effects. Misuse or ambiguity is negligible, meeting the highest descriptor for consistent accuracy.

annotations.comment: An abstract is not present; adding a concise abstract summarizing aims, methods, and conclusions would improve navigation and satisfy extended essay conventions.
The contents page is clearly formatted, listing all main sections with accurate page references to aid reader navigation.
Consider grouping appendices under a distinct heading or appendix section to improve clarity when navigating supplementary materials.
The introduction offers clear definitions of key rhetorical terms (ethos, pathos, logos, kairos, topoi), demonstrating strong subject knowledge and appropriate use of terminology.
The title page clearly states the research question and situates the investigation, providing precise focus that aligns closely with the essayâs analytical structure and central argument.
The document meets IB formatting requirements by including a word count, research question, and subject details on the title page.
Foundational definitions rely heavily on popular websites (Literary Devices, ThoughtCo); integrating primary classical sources or peer-reviewed scholarship would strengthen academic rigor.
The introductory paragraph ends mid-sentence, indicating incomplete content. Revise to ensure full articulation of scope and research focus.
Methodological details are dispersed within the introduction rather than consolidated under a dedicated section, making the rationale and procedures hard to locate.
The political background is well synthesized, providing necessary context that supports later rhetorical analysis of campaign speeches.
Ethos narrative occasionally restates speech content rather than evaluating its rhetorical impact; enhancing critical commentary will deepen analysis.
The pathos chapter correctly identifies and contextualizes vivid metaphors and contrasting themes, demonstrating accurate use of rhetorical terminology.
Sampling logic for audience-reception data (polling and media commentary) is only briefly sketched; a clearer justification of selection criteria would enhance methodological transparency.
The transition from political context to the concession speech summary is abrupt; adding a bridging paragraph would improve logical flow into the analysis chapters.
The summary of the concession speech is descriptive rather than analytical; introducing preliminary rhetorical insights here could better preview subsequent chapters.
The ethos section incorporates appropriate classical and scholarly citations (Aristotle, OâKeefe), grounding the analysis in established rhetorical theory.
The discussion of ad hominem attacks by opponents begins but is cut off mid-analysis; completing this argument is essential for coherence and depth.
Several contextual paragraphs repeat similar information about the DNC; tightening prose would maintain analytical focus and avoid redundancy.
The analysis does not address how different audience segments might respond emotionally; including potential counterresponses would strengthen critical depth.
Several devices (antithesis, metaphor, personification) are discussed in a single paragraph without distinguishing their distinct persuasive effects; separate and clarify for conceptual precision.
The pathos chapter ends with summary rather than an evaluative synthesis of the deviceâs overall effectiveness; a concluding evaluative sentence would close the chapter more impactfully.
The logos section effectively highlights Harrisâs use of statistics to turn abstract policy issues into concrete arguments, demonstrating sound logical analysis.
The argument on gender bias in logos is insightful but would benefit from empirical support (e.g., studies on gendered perceptions of credibility) to substantiate the claim.
The conclusion cuts off mid-idea (âAdditionally, theâ), undermining coherence. Completing this thought and tightening the closing paragraph will strengthen final impact.
Bibliography entries display inconsistent use of italics, quotation marks, and list formatting; standardize to a single citation style for consistency.
There is no critique of the reliability or context of statistical claims; discussing potential limitations of the data would reinforce analytical rigor.

The section juxtaposing policies mentions audience reception (âbenefit more than 100 millionâ) without linking back to polling or reception data; tie this claim explicitly to the stated methodology.
Some scholarly entries lack DOIs or stable URLs, hindering source verification; include persistent identifiers for all academic references.
Bibliography entries are not consistently ordered alphabetically; reordering according to author surname will improve presentation and navigability.
